description: Canonical recurring-pattern catalog for Epic #1133 (workflow self-annealing).

patterns.name: Branch-name validation rejections
patterns.description: PR branch name fails naming conventions
patterns.proposed_remediation: Add pre-push hook; improve CI error

patterns.name: File exceeds 100-line harness limit
patterns.description: Single file lint check failure; harness enforces ≤100 lines for maintainability
patterns.proposed_remediation: Refactor file into smaller modules; verify new_pattern handling above 100 lines

patterns.description: Evidence-completeness check fails within 60s window of status change
patterns.name: Evidence completeness 60s race condition
patterns.proposed_remediation: Increase race-detection timeout to 90s; add telemetry for timing skew

patterns.name: Admin signer non-independence violation
patterns.description: COLLABORATOR_HANDOFF and ADMIN_HANDOFF signed by same person; governance violation
patterns.proposed_remediation: Route PR approval to different admin; enforce via baton-gates.yml

patterns.name: Pre-commit hook failure → amend-only pattern
patterns.description: Hook fails, then developer amends instead of fixing root cause; masks issue
patterns.proposed_remediation: Improve hook error messages; add pre-push check to catch before amend

patterns.name: Signature variance (operator handle vs registry alias)
patterns.description: Same operator signs as different identities in handoff comments; breaks audit trail
patterns.proposed_remediation: Standardize operator identity in AGENTS.md; add team-model-signing lint

patterns.name: Worktree governance violations
patterns.description: Shared main checkout between Copilot + Claude Code + Codex; breaks isolation
patterns.proposed_remediation: Enforce via git worktree governance audit; create rescue worktree if collision

guidance.threshold_selection: Choose global N=2 for high-severity patterns (CHANGELOG conflicts, governance violations). Raise to N=3+ for medium/low-severity or noise-prone patterns (lint >100 lines). Multiplier allows context-aware tuning: 0.8x for rare-but-critical, 2.0x for frequent-but-low-signal.
guidance.new_pattern_workflow: Operator discovers recurring failure outside catalog → files as status:candidate in incidents.jsonl → monthly review decides: enabled (add to catalog), dormant (suppress TTL), or discard
guidance.pattern_lifecycle: enabled → dormant (paused) → archived (off for 90+ days). Track via enabled flag + created_date. No delete; only mark archived.
guidance.extensibility: Add new patterns via pull request to this file (keep ≤100 lines per harness standard; split to separate catalog if needed). Each pattern requires: id, name, regex, thresholds, remediation hint.
